commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

commit.message:
Fix HTML-only email handling: proper MIME parsing + HTML content forwarding

CF worker: complete rewrite with multipart MIME parsing, base64/QP decoding,
HTML tag stripping for text extraction. Now handles HTML-only emails properly.

Webhook: forward HTML content to admin inbox (renders in Outlook),
use stripped HTML as fallback for contact_inquiries message content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Save unknown info@ emails to contact_inquiries for admin visibility

Previously, emails from non-company senders to info@ were only forwarded
to admin inbox via Brevo — never saved to DB. Now they are also inserted
into contact_inquiries so they appear in adminsh Formulärförfrågningar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct invalid Claude model name in website prompt generator

claude-sonnet-4-20250514 does not exist — replaced with claude-sonnet-4-5
which is the model used throughout the rest of the project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: fetch post_name from API when WS payload lacks post.message

WebSocket conversation payloads don't include post.message, so post_name
was always null. Now the server fetches it from the Pancake messages API
asynchronously and updates the DB record.

commit.message:
feat: auto-calibration for BK selection + python -m mlx_mfa CLI

- calibrate_dispatch(calibrate_kernel_configs=True): benchmarks D=128
  BK=32 vs BK=64 at N=4096 and N=8192; picks BK=64 only if faster at
  BOTH points (< 0.95× BK=32); saves kernel_configs.d128_optimal_bk
  to ~/.mlx_mfa/dispatch_table.json
- _load_calibrated_kernel_config(): reads JSON at import, applies via
  os.environ.setdefault (user MFA_V2_FORCE_BK always wins)
- mlx_mfa/__main__.py: 'python -m mlx_mfa info' and 'calibrate [--quick]'
- Tests: TestAutoCalibration (2), TestMainCLI (2) — 541 pass

commit.message:
Replace all hardcoded URLs with APP_URL env var across 17 files

Audited entire server codebase for hardcoded smallbizagent.ai and
smallbizagent.com URLs. Replaced all with process.env.APP_URL
fallback pattern so Railway env vars control all production URLs.

Files fixed:
- SMS agents: followUp, rebooking, noShow, conversationalBooking
- notificationService: manage appointment/reservation URLs
- emailService: subscribe links, payment update links
- routes.ts: sitemap URLs, HELP keyword support email
- seoMiddleware: canonical URL, regex pattern
- gbpRoutes: Google Business Profile booking URL
- vapiWebhookHandler: reservation manage URL
- videoGenerationService: branding text in video overlays
- embedRoutes: default host fallback
- contentSeoAgent: CTA link in generated blog content
- subscriptionService: payment failure SMS link
- agentTestService: test booking link
- index.ts: CORS origins derived from APP_URL instead of hardcoded
- .env.example: documented APP_URL, SUPPORT_EMAIL, ADMIN_EMAIL,
  OPENWEATHER_API_KEY, RAILWAY_API_TOKEN

Co-Authored-By: Claude (claude-opus-4-6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

  batch-resolve COMMESSA→CODICE_ARTICOLO via COLLAUDO in single DISTINCT IN query,
  return codice_articolo field on each NC record
- placeholder.py: add _parse_date_param, _to_mosys_date, _build_nc_details_json helpers;
  replace keyword-category top 10 with Counter-based grouping by codice_articolo;
  add GET /api/analiza-top10 AJAX endpoint; add GET /api/nc-article-details/<path:> endpoint
- analiza_danych.html: date controls (month pagination, 7d/30d presets, from/to pickers),
  AJAX top 10 list refresh on range change, article detail modal with date-scoped NC table;
  initial page load defaults to last 7 days (server-rendered, no extra AJAX on first load)

commit.message:
feat(golden-image): add golden image management with baseline updates and differencing disks

Implements full golden image lifecycle — create VHDX from ISO, patch via
WSUS, sysprep, seal as immutable baseline, create/manage differencing
children, resize, optimize, and merge disks. Includes GoldenImageService,
ViewModel, wizard/dialog views, and comprehensive unit tests.

Also: UI/UX hardening across all views (WCAG AA contrast, loading overlays,
design token centralization, accessibility live regions, CardSurface
consistency, keyboard navigation), security fixes (async SemaphoreSlim
locking, path traversal guards, PowerShell injection prevention, JSON
deserialization safety), and AutomatedLab airgapped update tooling.

Add WebM demuxer with EBML parser and integration tests

Implements splica-webm crate with full EBML variable-length integer
parsing, WebM element ID definitions, and a streaming demuxer that
parses EBML headers, Segment/Info/Tracks metadata, and Cluster/SimpleBlock
packets. Supports VP8/VP9/AV1 video and Vorbis/Opus audio tracks.
Includes 11 EBML unit tests and 7 integration tests with synthetic WebM
data. Also applies cargo fmt across the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: peluquero crea turnos con estado 'en espera' automáticamente

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: force Step 1d to evaluate before Step 2 runs

The LLM was collapsing Step 1d + Step 2 into one bash script, capturing
RESUME_TASK as a variable but never acting on it, then falling through to
the ready-task query and returning NO_TASKS_AVAILABLE.

Root cause: Step 1d described what to capture but gave no hard decision
point to prevent the LLM from immediately continuing to Step 2.

Fix:
- Add explicit CRITICAL warning not to combine Step 1d with Step 2
- Split into numbered sub-steps 1d-1 through 1d-5 with explicit
  Evaluate sections after each bash call
- Each evaluation has a clear STOP / continue-to-Step-2 branch
- Add visible STOP notice after resume completes

commit.message:
fix: Code review fixes — cache invalidation, injection safety, deduplication

- invalidateGlobalCache() now called after init() and update() so global
  searches immediately reflect fresh data (was stale for up to 5 minutes)
- macOS/Linux screenshot post-processing: replaced execSync with shell
  interpolation with execFileSync + argument arrays (no command injection)
- Centralized SQL LIKE escaping: escapeLike() in db/queries.ts,
  escapeLikeTerm() in commands/shared.ts — removed 4 inline duplicates
- Added normalizePath() to shared.ts for consistent path normalization
- macOS sips: replaced shell pipe (tail+awk) with regex on direct output

commit.message:
Tight grid clustering for character pins — pixel-accurate, no overlap

Replace circular percentage-offset clustering with a row-grid layout
computed in pixel space using the map container's actual dimensions.
Bubbles are spaced at exactly BUBBLE_D + 2px gap (30px step) so they
pack as tightly as possible without ever overlapping, regardless of
map aspect ratio.

commit.message:
fix(transport-tests): fix 5 bugs found in fresh-eyes review of loopback harness

ssh-loopback.ts:
1. Remove unused clientPublicKey variable — was assigned from generateKeyPairSync
   but never read. The server accepts any publickey without fingerprint verification
   so the public key object is not needed.

2. Fix shell single-quote bug in createFakeNtmBin status case — the original
   code embedded '${SESSION}' inside an echo command wrapped in single quotes:
     echo '{"session":"${SESSION}",...}'
   Shell single-quoting prevents ALL variable expansion, so ${SESSION} would
   appear literally in the output instead of the actual session name. Fixed by
   removing the attempted substitution: NtmBridge.activity() does not use
   response.session from the JSON (it uses the parameter), so substituting
   the session name is unnecessary. Output the pre-serialized JSON verbatim.

3. createFakeNtmBin temp dir leaked on every call — the function returned a
   bare string path with no way for callers to clean up the mkdtempSync dir.
   Fixed by changing the return type to FakeNtmBin { binDir, cleanup() } so
   callers can call cleanup() in afterEach/finally.

ntm-bridge-runtime.test.ts:
4. 5 inline temp dirs created with mkdtempSync and never cleaned up — the
   "returns empty array when sessions list is empty", "active pane" (activity),
   "idle pane → stuck" (activity), "returns empty array when session does not
   exist", "empty stdout", and "malformed JSON" tests all created mkdtempSync
   dirs that were not deleted. Added a local tempBin() helper that pairs
   mkdtempSync+writeFileSync with a cleanup function, and wired cleanup()
   calls into every finally block and afterEach.

5. Unused fakeSsh variable in resume test — declared as {} as SSHManager but
   never passed to any function (NtmBridge takes a RemoteCommandRunner, not
   SSHManager). Removed the dead variable.

All 40 transport integration tests still pass. Full suite: 751 passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: stop false "Login required" banner on long-running sessions

extractAuthUrl matches any https URL > 40 chars. Once the "Welcome to
Claude Code" startup text scrolls out of the 512KB output buffer, URLs
in agent working output (DevOps, GitHub links) falsely triggered the
login banner. The existing 30s age timeout was unreachable because the
URL match returned first. Move age check before the banner render so
sessions older than 30s treat any URL as stale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Optimize images and loading performance Image compression (Pillow quality=72, ~7.4MB total saved): - Hero images: 548-1071KB → 244-613KB each - Gallery images: recompressed + gallery8/gallery22 resized 2048→1200px - Apartment photos: 102-445KB → 37-250KB each - Delete unused explore-hero.jpg (1.7MB) HTML optimizations: - Add fetchpriority="high" to all hero image preload links (6 pages) - Add width="870" height="345" to all logo tags (prevents CLS) Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6
